title: YTP Radio Drama - Grimace's Spooky Doppelbanger Soirée (Take 2)
description:
Second attempt. I rendered it at 2K this time to prevent the harsh dips in picture quality, let's see if this works. https://ko-fi.com/geibuchan
Why hello all of you, this is Geibuchan once again! Welcome to the first half of this Halloween Youtube Poop radio drama! Sorry for taking forever to return, and for being late for Hallowee--

y-- you are still here right?  o-- okay, good!

Started this project over a year ago, think it might have been two years, I forget, but it was meant to be released in conjunction with a Wacky Adventures of Ronald McDonald ytp of the Grimace Island episode, and I decided to do it upon rediscovering these Halloween McDonald' audio cassette tapes they released, with this audio YTP focusing on a tape I didn't have when I was younger.

That was the plan, except, at one point, this became the only project I could properly work on for a while. Eventually my Lenovo Thinkpad was at its deathbed, only years after it got a windows 11 "upgrade", which overtime made it more and more impossible to do anything in Adobe Premiere, without feeling like I was trying to get an egg to stand upright. And that's not even mentioning how the computer's device manager would have an aneurism every 30 minutes!

This situation felt pretty dire concerning all my unfinished projects, but I could still fool around in Audacity in the meantime, before I could find a solution to this and several other technical difficulties, by which I've managed to do in simply upgrading my old copy of Premiere Elements 10 to the 2020 version, and migrating to a powerful micro PC recommended to me by Stuart K. Reilly! Thanks again, buddy! It's been a real godsend!

And another thanks to Walrusguy for all the cool last minute ideas! Only when Halloween struck did I baaarely remember I still had this on the backburner, and he kept pitching more and more ideas for both radio dramas I started, for every time I shared a preview with him. Oh yes, there's another radio drama I finished too, using Azumanga Daioh! It'll be coming shortly!
